claim_text: Winter wheat (as an overwintering cover) survives in Manitoba only if seeded early by mid-late August.

value.raw_value_text: Winter wheat and triticale can also survive, but only if seeded early by mid-late August, and they generally produce less biomass and survive fewer extreme cold events of -15o C (Martens & Entz,30 2011; Blackshaw 2008).
value.text_value: Winter wheat (as an overwintering cover) survives in Manitoba only if seeded early by mid-late August.
